views.markdown: If you need help with "IOSSecuritySuite Bypass", you can contact Andreas, the developer, via e-mail.
Andreas is the maintainer of the package "IOSSecuritySuite Bypass". Please contact them via email for any questions on this version of the package.
If you found a mistake in the depiction or cannot download the package, you can reach out to the maintainer of the "FunTweaks" repo, DoubleY.
